records.m_Talk_ENG: Monsters invaded the thornbush forest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Monsters invaded the thornbush forest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Monsters invaded the thornbush forest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Lugh took care of them all before I even arrived.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Lugh took care of them all before I even arrived.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Lugh took care of them all before I even arrived.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's splendid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's splendid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's splendid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I must give her a reward.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I must give her a reward.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I must give her a reward.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However...
records.m_Talk_DEU: However...
records.m_Talk_FRA: However...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why is she not with you? Is she hurt?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why is she not with you? Is she hurt?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why is she not with you? Is she hurt?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well...

records.m_Talk_DEU: She's resting because she doesn't feel good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's resting because she doesn't feel good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cutie.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cutie.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cutie.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have a habit of avoiding my eyes when you have something to hide.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have a habit of avoiding my eyes when you have something to hide.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have a habit of avoiding my eyes when you have something to hide.

records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what?! Are you saying that I'm lying to you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did something... happen to that child?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did something... happen to that child?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did something... happen to that child?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I... took Lugh to the tailor shop.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I... took Lugh to the tailor shop.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I... took Lugh to the tailor shop.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The others saw Lugh's body and...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The others saw Lugh's body and...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The others saw Lugh's body and...

records.m_Talk_ENG: There...
records.m_Talk_DEU: There...
records.m_Talk_FRA: There...

records.m_Talk_ENG: There... was the brand of the traitor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There... was the brand of the traitor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There... was the brand of the traitor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No wonder the streets were somewhat chaotic.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No wonder the streets were somewhat chaotic.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No wonder the streets were somewhat chaotic.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems that my concerns have come true.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems that my concerns have come true.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems that my concerns have come true.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew it...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I knew it...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I knew it...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You knew from the start about her mark, didn't you, Merlin?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You knew from the start about her mark, didn't you, Merlin?

records.m_Talk_ENG: would you be as close with her as you are now, cutie?
records.m_Talk_DEU: would you be as close with her as you are now, cutie?
records.m_Talk_FRA: would you be as close with her as you are now, cutie?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Knowing that her fate was to form a pact with a devil?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Knowing that her fate was to form a pact with a devil?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Knowing that her fate was to form a pact with a devil?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lugh risked her life to help us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lugh risked her life to help us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lugh risked her life to help us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But all I did was...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But all I did was...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But all I did was...

records.m_Talk_ENG: reveal a secret she wanted hidden even though I meant goodwill.
records.m_Talk_DEU: reveal a secret she wanted hidden even though I meant goodwill.
records.m_Talk_FRA: reveal a secret she wanted hidden even though I meant goodwill.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's all so stupid...

records.m_Talk_FRA: It's all so stupid...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you had known from the beginning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you had known from the beginning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you had known from the beginning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Would you have kept that child's secret?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Would you have kept that child's secret?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Would you have kept that child's secret?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought the traitor from the Apocalypse Augury would be an evil person...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought the traitor from the Apocalypse Augury would be an evil person...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought the traitor from the Apocalypse Augury would be an evil person...

records.m_Talk_ENG: but seeing her help others... and coincidentally hearing her true feelings...
records.m_Talk_DEU: but seeing her help others... and coincidentally hearing her true feelings...
records.m_Talk_FRA: but seeing her help others... and coincidentally hearing her true feelings...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now... I can't hate her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now... I can't hate her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now... I can't hate her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are worried about her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are worried about her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are worried about her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You go on ahead first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You go on ahead first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You go on ahead first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm exhausted from hanging from a tree for so long that... I need some time to rest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm exhausted from hanging from a tree for so long that... I need some time to rest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm exhausted from hanging from a tree for so long that... I need some time to rest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Am I at fault here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Am I at fault here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Am I at fault here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Am I supposed to regret... that I should've just left that traitor in the gelid lands?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Am I supposed to regret... that I should've just left that traitor in the gelid lands?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Am I supposed to regret... that I should've just left that traitor in the gelid lands?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Regret changes nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Regret changes nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Regret changes nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Much like how the Old Avalon knew all its prophecies but could not avoid its fall.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Much like how the Old Avalon knew all its prophecies but could not avoid its fall.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Much like how the Old Avalon knew all its prophecies but could not avoid its fall.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then tell me, Merlin.

records.m_Talk_DEU: What am I supposed to do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What am I supposed to do?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if we know the future through prophecies, it does not mean that we should accept it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Would it not be best for you to make decisions resulting in the fewest regrets?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Would it not be best for you to make decisions resulting in the fewest regrets?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Would it not be best for you to make decisions resulting in the fewest regrets?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Monsters... again?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Monsters... again?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Monsters... again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you headed toward the Stump?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you headed toward the Stump?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you headed toward the Stump?
